flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Craven Community College fell 28% between 2006 and 2009 (20.1% → 14.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Craven Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Craven Community College fell 23% between 2015 and 2017 ($5.5k → $4.3k).
